data.current_description: NOTE that the full URL for this API call is https://api.na.bambora.com/scripts/tokenization/tokens. Turn a credit card into a token using this service. This helps lessen your PCI scope by not passing the credit card information to your server. Instead you turn the card number into a token in the client app, then send the token to the server. When you send the token to Bambora to make a payment, Bambora then looks up the card number from that token and makes the payment. Tokens can also be used to create payment profiles.
data.summary_suggestion: Convert credit card to secure payment token
data.description_suggestion: Converts credit card details into a secure, reusable token for payment processing. Accepts card information via TokenRequest and returns a token that can be used for subsequent payment transactions or to create payment profiles. This operation reduces PCI compliance scope by keeping sensitive card data client-side. The returned token can be sent to your server and used with payment APIs instead of raw card numbers. Tokens are single-use or multi-use depending on configuration.

data.current_description: NOTE that the full URL for this API call is https://api.na.bambora.com/scripts/tokenization/tokens. Turn a credit card into a token using this service. This helps lessen your PCI scope by not passing the credit card information to your server. Instead you turn the card number into a token in the client app, then send the token to the server. When you send the token to Bambora to make a payment, Bambora then looks up the card number from that token and makes the payment. Tokens can also be used to create payment profiles.
data.summary_suggestion: Convert credit card to secure payment token
data.description_suggestion: Converts credit card details into a secure, reusable token for payment processing. Accepts card information via TokenRequest and returns a token that can be used for subsequent payment transactions or to create payment profiles. This operation reduces PCI compliance scope by keeping sensitive card data client-side. The returned token can be sent to your server and used with payment APIs instead of raw card numbers. Tokens are single-use or multi-use depending on configuration.
data.reasoning: Original summary lacks specificity about the security/tokenization purpose. Description is verbose and conversational, mixing implementation details with operational context.
